title: Sasaella magohukuana
taxonomy: Sasaella magohukuana is a species of bamboo in the family Poaceae. It is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the genus Sasaella. Within the family Poaceae, Sasaella magohukuana is a member of the subfamily Bambusoideae. The subfamily Bambusoideae is further divided into several tribes, and Sasaella magohukuana is classified under the tribe Arundinarieae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
